placement_observations.size_descriptor: elementwise operand, same shape as input_a (test tensors)
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) preceding ttnn.divide(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: large sparse tensor [..., V] with V potentially >> 65536; processed in last-dim chunks of 65536
placement_observations.source: call site _l2_normalize_sparse_ttnn: sparse_tt = ttnn.to_memory_config(sparse_tt, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); CHUNK = 65536; ttnn.divide(chunk, norm_tt) per slice then ttnn.concat

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [Q, P] bfloat16 mask expanded from per-row lengths
placement_observations.source: call site: valid_tt = ttnn.from_torch(valid_mask, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) consumed by ttnn.multiply(cm_tt, valid_tt) immediately after ttnn.divide(scores_sum_tt, q_lens_tt)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small per-sequence count tensor [B, 1, 1] regime (mean-pool denominator)
placement_observations.source: call site (mean sentence pooling): counts_tt created with dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT; pooled_tt = ttnn.divide(summed_tt, counts_tt)
